approach:      - The mock is used for logic-level unit tests (CardOps, GovernanceOps, etc.).      - Integration tests (Integration.t.sol) target the actual deployed WASM contracts        on an Arbitrum Sepolia fork.      - The mock faithfully implements all unconditional invariants from \u00a73.7 to ensure        invariant tests are valid even without WASM.Unconditional invariants enforced (\u00a73.7):      1. CardEntries[addr].exists is write-once-true.      2. CardEntries[addr].forward_to is immutable once non-zero.      3. PressAuthorizations[p][a].revoked_at is write-once-non-zero.      4. SubCardRegistrations[addr].deregistered_at is write-once-non-zero.      5. PolicyAuthorizerKeys has no unconditional delete (governed only).","kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"Mock Storage Contract","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Solidity implementation mirroring the storage-contract behavior for unit testing.         Used in Foundry tests where the Stylus WASM contract cannot be directly deployed         without a live Arbitrum node.
